subject: Genesect, the Paleozoic Pokemon — ancient Bug/Steel-type creature with a cannon mounted on its back, restored and modified by Team Plasma
description: A robotic-looking insectoid creature is depicted mid-air against a pale background. The figure has a distinctly mechanical appearance with a large cannon-like structure mounted on its upper back. The creature's body combines organic insect forms with metallic purple and grey plating. Its limbs are extended as if in flight or leaping posture. The holofoil treatment adds shimmer to the metallic surfaces. The overall impression is of a cybernetic insect, visually fusing prehistoric creature design with mechanical modification.
foreground: cybernetic insectoid creature with back-mounted cannon, limbs extended
